posts.author: ReeseBarber (Reese Barber)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

I’m a recruiter with TEKsystems a large IT employment agency. One of our Michigan clients is looking to integrate Make with Monday. They are looking for 2 people to help with this effort. This is a search that I’m having struggling finding someone. Hoping I can gain some traction here. Let me know if you’re interested in learning more. Thanks!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ReeseBarber

welcome to the monday

We are a Make Gold Partner and integration experts.

We have rich experience in both integrate Make with Monday. implements before we proceed for a formal engagement. we shoulde keep the call and we shoulde discuss about it

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ReeseBarber

I am from Growwstacks Automation Solutions. We are Gold Partners with make.com and Automation Experts, and we’ve created 20+ custom apps and delivered over 500 automation projects in the last 12 months. We’ve worked for Make Technical Support and solved over 5000+ technical issues & complex cases.

Happy to help you build your dream automation and scale your business.

Let’s Schedule the call and discuss this in more detail. I look forward to talking to you and your team should they join us.

We can help you with your integrations, implementations, support, improvement, training, and services and you can also learn along the way!

Thanks and Regards
Sachin Karma
GrowwStacks Automation Soluions
